lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor wear from regular use but has been well-maintained and is fully functional. There are no major mechanical or cosmetic issues.
The vehicle is in poor condition. It is currently non-operational and requires significant mechanical repairs. The exterior has extensive body damage and the interior shows heavy wear.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic repairs before it can be considered roadworthy. The exterior displays heavy wear, including several deep scratches, noticeable dents, and areas of rust starting to form. Mechanically, the engine runs roughly and there is a known transmission issue that needs immediate attention. The interior has seen better days, with torn upholstery and some non-functional electronics. This is a project car for someone with the time and resources to restore it.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing exactly as it did when it first left the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, featuring a deep, mirror-like shine with no scratches or dents. The interior is equally pristine, with the original upholstery and surfaces showing zero wear. Mechanically, the car is in perfect health, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment. It offers a true like-new driving experience.
Fair condition.

Get ready to drive away in a fantastic vehicle that has been well-cared for and is ready for its next adventure! This car offers a smooth, solid ride and has been consistently maintained to ensure it stays in great shape. While you might find a few minor signs of previous use, its overall condition is impressive and it remains a truly reliable choice for any driver!

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it balances refined performance with lasting value. Every aspect of this automobile has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for safety and mechanical integrity. A sophisticated choice for those who demand quality without compromise.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super dependable for all my errands and weekend trips. You’re going to love how smooth it feels on the road! It’s clean, well-cared for, and totally ready for its next adventure with you. Come take it for a spin—I think you're going to fall in love with it!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and an optimized double VANOS system for a broad power band. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a variable M-differential lock, ensuring exceptional mechanical grip. The chassis has been enhanced with subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings, maintaining the precise kinematics of the multi-link rear suspension. Recent service includes a comprehensive valve adjustment and rod bearing replacement, ensuring the internal reciprocating assembly is within factory tolerances. A mechanically sound example built for the discerning driver who values throttle response and chassis balance.
Well-maintained vehicle. Runs well. Clean interior. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a fantastic balance of luxury, performance, and reliability. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish that has been regularly waxed, showing only the minor stone chips consistent with careful highway driving. Inside, the cabin remains a premium environment; the high-quality leather upholstery is supple and free of tears, showing only light natural creasing on the driver’s bolster. All onboard electronics, including the infotainment system and dual-zone climate control, operate exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health with a documented history of timely oil changes and preventative maintenance. It starts eagerly, idles smoothly, and the transmission provides crisp, seamless shifts. Equipped with tires that have plenty of tread remaining and brakes that bite firmly, this car is ready for the road with no immediate service needs. It has been a smoke-free, pet-free vehicle, kept primarily in a covered garage to preserve its condition.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a premier balance of performance and value. Having undergone a rigorous professional assessment, this unit exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic. It stands as a testament to diligent ownership and remains prepared for immediate, reliable service.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and value. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and long-term reliability. The exterior retains its refined character, while the interior provides a sophisticated environment for the discerning driver. A premier selection for those seeking quality and proven durability without the premium of a showroom-new price tag.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and she’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me—perfect for someone looking for a dependable ride that still looks great on the road. I’ve taken good care of it, and it’s ready for its next adventure with you! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from a reinforced rear subframe and a recently overhauled VANOS system to ensure optimal valve timing. With its limited-slip variable M differential and near 50/50 weight distribution, this example provides the pure mechanical feedback and high-revving throttle response synonymous with the chassis. Meticulously maintained with recent rod bearing service, it’s a driver-focused machine ready for the apex.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable engine. Minor cosmetic wear. Ready for immediate use.

This meticulously maintained 2019 luxury SUV offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though a close inspection reveals a few minor stone chips on the front fascia consistent with regular highway use. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free environment featuring premium leather seating that remains supple, with only light natural creasing on the driver’s side bolster. Every electronic component, from the panoramic sunroof to the premium sound system, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this vehicle is in excellent health; it has followed a strict factory maintenance schedule, with a recent full service and brake inspection completed last month. The tires provide ample tread for several seasons to come, and the engine runs smooth and quiet. This is a reliable, turn-key vehicle that has been cared for with an eye for detail, ready to provide its next owner with years of dependable service.

This refined motorcar represents a superior acquisition for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and showcasing consistent mechanical integrity, the vehicle offers a harmonious balance of performance and aesthetic appeal. Every component has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our exacting standards for reliability and roadworthiness. This offering provides a sophisticated driving experience, standing as a testament to conscientious ownership and enduring engineering quality.

This exceptional vehicle exemplifies a sophisticated balance of engineering excellence and enduring value. Meticulously maintained throughout its tenure, the automobile presents in commendable condition, offering a refined driving experience for the discerning professional. Both the mechanical components and the interior appointments demonstrate a history of attentive stewardship, ensuring immediate reliability and aesthetic appeal.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been absolute gold to me. It's been really well-loved and is in great shape for its next adventure! Runs super smoothly and is ready to hit the road today. Perfect for anyone looking for a reliable, comfy car that still looks fantastic. Come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through its six individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS variable valve timing. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp engagement, paired with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal torque distribution. Recent preventative maintenance includes subframe reinforcement and a VANOS system refresh. The chassis remains taut with Bilstein dampers, ensuring the 50/50 weight distribution is fully exploited. While the exterior shows minor road patina, the mechanical integrity is robust, offering a pure analog driving experience.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor road chips one would expect from careful use, while the alloy wheels remain free of major curbing. Inside, the cabin is a clean, non-smoking environment; the premium upholstery has been regularly conditioned, and every electronic feature—from the dual-zone climate control to the infotainment system—functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule. It recently underwent a full service, including a fresh oil change and a brake system check, ensuring a smooth, responsive ride. With its robust service history and well-preserved aesthetics, this car is ready for its next chapter and offers a refined driving experience for years to come.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a harmonious balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. Having undergone a rigorous professional inspection, this unit demonstrates consistent performance and a refined cabin environment. This offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience that reflects a history of diligent ownership and attentive care.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of refined performance and enduring value. Its history of diligent care is evident in every detail, ensuring that it remains a sophisticated and dependable choice for the road ahead.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin is a testament to pride of ownership; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and free of significant wear, while the dashboard and controls show minimal aging. Every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the intuitive infotainment system, functions exactly as intended.
